content.full_text:
February 24, 2004

Jacqueline M. Zischke
Lombardo & Gilles
Post Office 2119
Salinas, CA 93902-2119

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-030

Dear Ms. Zischke:

This letter is to confirm that, in response to our telephone conversation of February 19, 2004, your request for written advice in the above-referenced matter has been withdrawn. Under regulation 18329(b)(2)(A), a request for formal written advice will not be acted upon if the name, title or position, and mailing address of the person whose duties are in question are not provided in that request.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division
